# Mooch

> UX research and AI automation studio based in London and Lisbon. A husband-and-wife team, lean and mighty.

We figure out what people actually need, then build the AI to deliver it. Most of our clients come to us for one and stay for both.

## Contact

- Email: hey@mooch.agency
- X: @tahigichigi
- Substack: moochagency.substack.com

## Case studies

- [gov.uk](https://mooch.agency/gov-uk): UX research for gov.uk services. Accessibility audits, user testing, and service design for government digital products.
- [Octant](https://mooch.agency/octant): UX research and product strategy for Octant, a web3 public goods funding platform.
- [British Airways](https://mooch.agency/british-airways): UX research for British Airways digital products.
- [zkSync](https://mooch.agency/zksync): UX research for zkSync, an Ethereum Layer 2 scaling protocol.
- [Big Debate Club](https://mooch.agency/big-debate-club): Brand and product development for Big Debate Club, a debate platform for young people.
- [Contrabando](https://mooch.agency/contrabando): AI-powered review automation for a Lisbon restaurant group.

## Products

- [toneofvoice.app](https://toneofvoice.app): AI-powered tone of voice analysis tool.
